# Stadium Guardian Operations Center

An AI-powered, Web3-enabled command dashboard optimized for mega-event crowd control and multilingual telemetry processing.

## Core Architecture
* [Live Application](https://smart-stadium-guardians.web.app/)
* [Source Code Repository](https://github.com/)
* [Google Gemini API Integration](https://ai.google.dev/)
* [Polygon Blockchain Ledger](https://polygon.technology/)

## System Capabilities
Real-time streaming parsing, automated crowd anomaly vectoring via Gemini 3.5 Flash, decentralized workforce gamification via ERC-1155 tokens, and Web Speech matrix translations.
